## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences. If it changes a number the tool prints, explain the math. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build && npm test` green locally
- [ ] No runtime dependencies added (devDependencies are fine)
- [ ] If a printed figure changed: METHODOLOGY.md updated to match the code, and `--explain` still traces it
- [ ] If rendered output changed: snapshot updates are intentional and reviewed
- [ ] No conversation content is read, and no network calls are introduced (the two hard promises)
